content: Pellet (stardog-union/pellet) is effectively unmaintained (dual AGPL/commercial, infrequent releases). Openllet (Galigator/openllet) is the actively-referenced community fork built on Pellet 2.0 and performs measurably better in published 2023 reasoner benchmarks (fewer datatype errors, better syntax-error tolerance) — prefer Openllet over vanilla Pellet if a Pellet-family reasoner is wanted alongside HermiT.
